title: BELL Lighting E27 LED Light Bulbs 6 Pack | 8.1 W 810 Lumen Natural White 4000 K | Large Edison Screw Cap ES | Energy Saving GLS LED Bulb | 60 W Equivalent | Non-Dimmable Cool White Lighting
features: Bright and Balanced Natural White Light - Illuminate your home with 4000 K natural white light that’s bright yet comfortable on the eyes. Perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, and workspaces, these E27 LED light bulbs provide clear visibility and vibrant colour rendering for modern, everyday living.

High Performance Energy Saver - Enjoy the brightness of a 60 W equivalent bulb using only 8.1 W of power. These energy-saving E27 LED bulbs reduce electricity costs without compromising on clarity—ideal for homes seeking sustainable, long-lasting performance with reliable daily use.

Easy Screw-In Fitting - Fitted with a large E27 Edison screw cap, these bulbs are quick and simple to install in most UK ceiling lights, pendants, and lamps. The standard ES cap design offers universal compatibility and instant full brightness the moment you switch on.

Flicker-Free Comfort Lighting - Designed with Eye Guard flicker-free technology, these bulbs produce smooth, consistent light with minimal glare. Ideal for long hours under artificial lighting, they promote better comfort for reading, cooking, and working throughout the day.

Built to Last with British Quality - Crafted to last up to 20 000 hours, these non-dimmable LED bulbs deliver dependable brightness and efficiency year after year. BELL Lighting combines a century of lighting expertise with cutting-edge LED innovation to bring you exceptional reliability and performance.
description: Product Description What kind of light does the 4000K colour temperature give off? This bulb emits a Natural White 4000K tone—bright, fresh, and neutral. It's perfect for spaces where you want clarity without the starkness of cool white—like kitchens, offices, or craft rooms. Why is this bulb considered an upgrade over traditional lighting? With 8.1W energy use replacing a 60W halogen, it offers up to 86% energy savings, a lifespan of 20,000 hours, and modern flicker-free, eye-friendly illumination. It’s an easy and sustainable way to modernise your lighting. Does this bulb reduce glare or uneven lighting? Yes, the opal-coated lens helps spread light smoothly across your room, creating a soft, diffused glow. It reduces harsh spots and shadows, delivering clean, even illumination ideal for both practical and decorative use. Is this model dimmable? No—this version is non-dimmable. For use with dimmer switches, be sure to choose a compatible dimmable E27 version to avoid flickering or reduced lifespan. Is this bulb bright enough for everyday use? Yes. At 810 lumens, it matches the output of a traditional 60W halogen bulb, but uses only 8.1W—making it both powerful and energy efficient.
